regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces intensifying multi-front crisis with active military confrontation (Isfahan strikes, naval seizures, ~3,300 war deaths), severe internal fractures exposed by Ghalibaf's resignation and secret letters to succession figures, and compounding economic strain from bread shortages despite increased oil revenues from wartime trading.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On April 25-26, 2026, US Defense Secretary Hegseth confirmed bomber strikes on Isfahan while negotiations advanced in Pakistan; simultaneously, Iran's negotiating team head Ghalibaf resigned amid leadership divisions, the IRGC Navy seized vessels and mapped undersea infrastructure in response to Trump's Strait of Hormuz ultimatum, and regime executed a January uprising protester while deploying unity campaigns exposing deep succession anxieties.
